should_trigger.prompt: Convene the council on whether we should sign this 3-year exclusivity clause.
I need this answer to be RIGHT — get multiple models on it.
Get me a second and third opinion on this diagnosis of our churn problem.
Maximum accuracy: is this legal interpretation correct?
should_trigger.expect: council + verification round on disputed facts

near_misses.prompt: Fan out the audit across three agents, one doc each.
near_misses.expect: jail-orchestrate — division of labor, not redundancy
direct answer — trivially settleable; council adds nothing (may note-and-proceed if user insists)

near_misses.prompt: Which of these two logos do you like more?
near_misses.expect: preference, not accuracy — jail-decide/direct, no council

behavioral.prompt: Convene a council (only one model family available).
assertions: protocol still runs: blind answers + anonymized review
reviews reference answers as A/B/C only
no model/member names in review stage
every review names ≥1 concrete error/gap OR explicit 'none found — checked: …'
agreement without inspection flagged as convergence theater

behavioral.prompt: 4 members assert X from memory; 1 cites a primary source for not-X.
assertions: majority noted in dissent register with what would decide it
output contains roster+tier, ranking table, verification results, cost disclosure
